About HowManyOfMe

Ever wondered "how many people have my name?" or "how common is my name?" — you're in the right place. HowManyOfMe is the platform built to answer exactly that, using real data from over 100 million names across 80+ countries.

100M+
Names in database
80+
Countries covered
Millions
Monthly searches
140+
Years of data

Meet the Creator

I'm Ziven Borceg — a builder, tinkerer, and someone who genuinely enjoys making useful things on the internet.

I'm not a big corporation or a faceless team. I'm one person who believes the web needs more tools that are simple, fast, and actually helpful.

Built by Ziven Borceg

Hi, I'm Ziven Borceg. Welcome to howmanyofme.co — your all-in-one platform to discover how many people around the world share your first or last name, explore name popularity trends, and uncover the origins and meaning behind names.
